input.description: Re-run API typecheck and tests after auth hook adjustment

content.text:
Implemented Prompt `T3` from `docs/development-plan-v1.md` section `12.2` and marked it complete.

### What I changed

- Updated `apps/api/src/app.ts` to add the API shell and auth spine:
  - Mounted protected `GET /api/v1`.
  - Added JWKS-backed JWT verification using `jose` (`JWT_ISSUER`, `JWT_AUDIENCE`, `JWT_JWKS_URI`).
  - Enforced auth on all routes except `GET /health` (unsigned requests get `401`).
  - Added request correlation handling:
    - Accepts/propagates `x-request-id`.
    - Sets `request.request_id`.
    - Returns `request_id` in error responses.
  - Added consistent API error responses (`{ code, message, request_id }`) via `apiErrorSchema`.
  - Added `404` not-found handler with the same error shape.

- Expanded `apps/api/src/app.test.ts` with mocked JWKS integration tests:
  - Starts a local JWKS server in test.
  - Signs valid JWTs against generated test keys.
  - Verifies:
    - `/health` works without auth.
    - `/api/v1` rejects unsigned and invalid tokens.
    - `/api/v1` accepts valid JWTs from mocked JWKS.
    - `x-request-id` propagation.

- Updated config/docs:
  - Added JWT placeholders to `.env.example`.
  - Marked `Prompt T3` as done in `docs/development-plan-v1.md` (`DONE 2026-04-30`).
  - Added `jose` to `apps/api/package.json` (and updated `package-lock.json`).

### Verification run

- `npm run typecheck -w @memories/api` ✅
- `npm run test -w @memories/api` ✅ (4/4 passing)

If you want, I can move straight to implementing `Prompt T4` next.

I’ll implement `T4` next by adding route-level authz middleware that enforces JWT claim binding to `:clientId` (and memory-route expectations), then I’ll add focused tests for cross-client denial behavior.
I’m now adding claim-aware authz enforcement (`clientId`/`memoryId` route binding + 403 telemetry) inside the API middleware, then I’ll extend tests with cross-client and client-self scope scenarios.

input.command: npm run typecheck -w @memories/api; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run test -w @memories/api
input.description: Re-run API typecheck and tests after TS fix
List files changed after T4 implementation
Inspect T4 code and plan diffs

content.text:
Implemented `Prompt T4`.

### What I changed

- Added authz middleware in `apps/api/src/app.ts` that enforces JWT claim binding for route params:
  - `:clientId` must be authorized by token scope (`client_id` and/or `client_ids`).
  - `practice_id` is required for client-scoped routes.
  - Routes with `:memoryId` but no `:clientId` are denied (`403`) to prevent unscoped memory access.
  - `CLIENT_SELF` tokens must be narrow (single-client scope matching `client_id`).
- Added structured 403 telemetry (no PHI) on denial:
  - `event`, `reason`, `request_id`, `route`, `method`, `target_client_id`, `memory_id_present`, `actor_hash`.
- Expanded `apps/api/src/app.test.ts` with authz-focused tests:
  - allows matching client scope
  - denies cross-client access (`403`)
  - allows guide token with `client_ids`
  - denies non-narrow `CLIENT_SELF`
  - denies memory route missing `clientId` binding
- Marked `T4` as complete in `docs/development-plan-v1.md` (`DONE 2026-04-30`).

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck -w @memories/api` ✅
- `npm run test -w @memories/api` ✅ (9 tests passing)

I also preserved other existing edits already present in `docs/development-plan-v1.md` and only added the `T4` done marker.
